name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, beat together butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy. Add the granulated sugar; mix well.
4. Beat in eggs; mix thoroughly.
5. In a medium bowl, combine flour, oats, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt.
6. Mix dry ingredients into the wet mixture well.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Sprinkle remaining sugar and cinnamon over each cookie.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes.
10. Let cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheet before transferring to a wire cooling rack.
